_publications._publicationTitle: Natural history of meningioma development in mice reveals: a synergy of Nf2 and p16(Ink4a) mutations.

_contextSnippet: The PGDS staining pattern of normal arachnoid in mice is similar to that observed and reported in humans... shows intracytoplasmic granules in perinuclear distribution
details: Normal arachnoid cells in mice showed similar PGDS staining pattern to humans with intracytoplasmic granules in perinuclear distribution
